home.title: Hello, I'm
home.name: Azatbek
home.description: I am studying at the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence at Samarkand State University (SamDU) and I aim to become a Full Stack Developer. Through my interest in programming, I am studying modern web technologies and working on various practical projects. My goal is to create user-friendly, fast and high-quality web applications and develop as a professional developer.

footer.description: I bring your ideas to life through clean, modern code and design.

about-me.title: About me
about-me.description: Hello! I am Azatbek Ermalaev. I was born in the Republic of Karakalpakstan and am currently studying at the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence at Samarkand State University (SamDU). I am developing myself as a Full Stack developer. Through my interest in programming, I have been studying frontend and backend technologies. Currently, I am mainly working on frontend technologies such as React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS and trying to create modern, user-friendly interfaces.
